ethics_council.meaning: Real when the local EthicsCouncil source is importable through configured paths.

trustworthy_agent_stack.meaning: Bridge surfaces exist and may use local TrustworthyAgentStack demo/helpers, but full runtime enforcement closure is not yet guaranteed.

meaning_assay.meaning: Real when meaning-assay is importable, with heuristic case translation still limiting generality.

sophron_cer.meaning: Validation bridge exists and can run when local SOPHRON assets are present, but evidence closure remains uneven.

cer_telemetry_stack.meaning: Telemetry is only fully available when both TrustworthyAgentStack-side export helpers and SOPHRON validation surfaces are present.
